commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P1] The remaining blocker is a narrow mechanical scanner/test alignment on the PR branch, with no product decision required.; Needs attention: The patch is security-sensitive because incomplete reasoning-tag stripping can expose hidden model reasoning in user-visible channels.; Review finding: [P1] Match reasoning attributes in streaming scanners — src/agents/embedded-agent-utils.ts:194 (sha=95b6e8ba90f0bc3d5fc5d7d8e6d196d3a9781ddb)
commands.review_summary:
This PR adds `reasoning` and `antml:reasoning` to assistant-visible reasoning tag stripping and embedded chat reply stripping, with focused sanitizer regression coverage.

PR surface: Source +45, Tests +38. Total +83 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence reproduction path: stream `<reasoning hidden="1">secret</reasoning>Visible` through the embedded handler, which detects the tag but then calls a scanner that only matches bare tags. I did not run the test command because this review is read-only and tests can write artifacts.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blocker is a narrow mechanical scanner/test alignment on the PR branch, with no product decision required.

target.title: fix(agents): strip reasoning tags from chat replies
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes #89473.

- Treat `<reasoning>` and `<antml:reasoning>` as reasoning-control tags in assistant-visible final sanitization.
- Require an exact tag-name boundary for the newly recognized reasoning tags so visible XML-ish prose such as `<reasoning-step>` stays visible.
- Keep leading unclosed `<reasoning>` bodies hidden, while preserving literal visible prose mentions such as `The <reasoning> tag ...`.
- Add the same reasoning tag names to embedded stream/block-reply stripping and tagged-thinking extraction.

## Root Cause

OpenAI-compatible providers can emit hidden reasoning inside `<reasoning>` blocks, but the final assistant text sanitizer and embedded chat delivery scanners only recognized the older think/thinking/thought tag variants. Adding `reasoning` also needs a strict boundary because `\b` would classify names like `<reasoning-step>` as hidden-control tags, and strict unclosed-tag recovery needs to distinguish leading hidden reasoning from visible prose that merely mentions the tag.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Assistant-visible final text and embedded chat block replies now strip hidden `<reasoning>` and `<antml:reasoning>` blocks through the same paths that already strip think/thinking tags. Visible non-control tags such as `<reasoning-step>` and the standalone literal prose mention `The <reasoning> tag ...` remain visible. Leading hidden blocks such as `<reasoning> tag should be hidden`, and visible-prefix replies that then open an unclosed reasoning block, remain hidden after the visible prefix.

Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw checkout on this PR branch at `95b6e8ba90f0bc3d5fc5d7d8e6d196d3a9781ddb`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: Ran a local `pnpm exec tsx --eval '...'` source probe importing `src/shared/text/reasoning-tags.ts`, `src/shared/text/assistant-visible-text.ts`, and `src/agents/embedded-agent-utils.ts`; then ran focused Vitest coverage for the shared sanitizer, embedded extraction helper, embedded subscribe block-reply flow, and message handler recompute trigger.

Evidence after fix:

```json
{"input":"Before<reasoning>internal reasoning</reasoning>After","strip":"BeforeAfter","sanitize":"BeforeAfter","extract":"BeforeAfter"}
{"input":"The <reasoning> tag is deprecated in this example.","strip":"The <reasoning> tag is deprecated in this example.","sanitize":"The <reasoning> tag is deprecated in this example.","extract":"The <reasoning> tag is deprecated in this example."}
{"input":"Visible prefix <reasoning> tag should be hidden","strip":"Visible prefix","sanitize":"Visible prefix"}
{"input":"<reasoning> tag should be hidden","strip":"","sanitize":"","extract":""}
{"input":"<reasoning/>Visible","strip":"Visible","sanitize":"Visible","extract":"Visible"}
{"input":"A <reasoning-step>visible</reasoning-step> B","strip":"A <reasoning-step>visible</reasoning-step> B","sanitize":"A <reasoning-step>visible</reasoning-step> B","extract":"A <reasoning-step>visible</reasoning-step> B"}
```

Observed result after fix: Closed reasoning blocks are removed from visible assistant text, literal standalone tag mentions survive final/non-stream extraction, leading unclosed reasoning text stays hidden, visible-prefix unclosed reasoning text keeps only the visible prefix, self-closing reasoning tags do not swallow following visible text, and the embedded subscriber tag matrix now covers `reasoning` and `antml:reasoning` block replies.

What was not tested: Full repository suite, broad changed checks beyond GitHub CI, and a live MiniMax/LiteLLM reproduction.

## Verification

- `pnpm exec tsx --eval '...'` direct source proof above
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/shared/text/reasoning-tags.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-utils.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.subscribe-embedded-agent-session.subscribeembeddedagentsession.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.handlers.messages.test.ts --reporter=dot` -> 4 files / 205 tests passed
- `pnpm exec oxfmt src/shared/text/reasoning-tags.ts src/shared/text/reasoning-tags.test.ts` -> passed
- `git diff --check` -> passed
target.author: monkeyleet
